title: Call of Duty Mobile
description: Call of Duty Mobile brings console-quality FPS action to your phone with iconic maps, modes, and weapons from the franchise.

title: Fortnite
description: Fortnite is the completely free online game where you and your friends fight to be the last one standing in Battle Royale.

title: Roblox
description: Roblox is the ultimate virtual universe that lets you create, share experiences, and be anything you can imagine.

title: Asphalt 9: Legends
description: Asphalt 9: Legends features a top roster of real hypercars for you to drive unlike anything seen in other games.

title: Genshin Impact
description: Step into Teyvat, a vast world teeming with life and flowing with elemental energy. You and your sibling arrived here from another world.

title: PUBG Mobile
description: PUBG Mobile is a battle royale game where 100 players parachute onto an island and fight to be the last one standing.

title: Clash Royale
description: Enter the Arena! Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles.

title: Brawl Stars
description: Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile. Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful abilities.

title: Black Strike: War Shooter
description: Offline FPS shooter with long story missions, intense gunfights, vehicle combat, sniper shots, and a Zombie survival mode.

title: Overwatch Rush
description: A 4v4 top-down mobile hero shooter built from the ground up for mobile, set in the Overwatch universe.

title: Parasite Z
description: Survival horror inspired by Resident Evil. Explore an abandoned prison complex overrun by a parasite outbreak using Unreal Engine 5.

title: Katori: Katana Masters
description: Brutal samurai action with dynamic duels, devastating combos, and an epic revenge story set in feudal Japan.

title: Narin: Secrets of Dwarvenia
description: A 2.5D action game where you play as Narin, a dwarf warrior fighting to liberate Dwarvenia from invading goblins and monsters.

title: Barbie Horse Ride & Rescue
description: Ride and rescue beautiful horses as you uncover the mysteries of Moonrise Valley with Barbie.

title: Among the Sleep
description: A first-person horror adventure where you play as a two-year-old child exploring surreal and frightening environments.

title: Exhausted Man
description: A physics-comedy game where you help an exhausted person get through a crucial night, doing everything while lying down.

title: Construction World 2: Puzzle
description: Build and construct in this puzzle-simulation game featuring heavy machinery and construction challenges.

title: Go Ape Ship!
description: Co-op monkey mayhem in space! Work together with friends to keep your spaceship running in this chaotic party game.

description: An open-world action RPG set in the world of The Seven Deadly Sins with stunning visuals and epic combat.

description: The iconic tactical shooter comes to mobile with 5v5 PvP, destructible environments, and a growing roster of Operators.

title: Oceanhorn 3: Legend of the Shadow Sea
description: An epic action-adventure in the spirit of classic console RPGs. Explore the seas, solve puzzles, and battle enemies.

title: Subnautica: Below Zero
description: Dive into a freezing underwater adventure on an alien planet. Build bases, craft equipment, and uncover hidden secrets.

title: Where Winds Meet
description: An epic open-world Wuxia action RPG set in 10th-century China. Master the sword and uncover forgotten truths.

description: Officially authorized BLEACH action RPG. Step into the Soul Society, unleash Bankai, and fight alongside iconic Shinigami in story-driven combat.

description: A stylish anime action game where you play as hidden warriors in a beautifully crafted feudal world.

description: Become the strongest at Furin High in this 3D action RPG based on the WIND BREAKER anime. Tag-skill combat with iconic characters.

description: Crush colossal Kaiju in epic turn-based battles. Based on the global hit anime, command the Defense Force and unleash devastating Ultimate attacks.

title: Black Clover M: Rise of the Wizard King (Discontinued)
description: [DISCONTINUED - Service ended August 2025] Official Black Clover mobile RPG by Vic Game Studios. Joined Asta, Yuno and the Black Bulls in this 3D collection RPG. Game servers were shut down on August 21, 2025.

description: Become a hero alongside Saitama in this official One Punch Man action RPG. Battle monsters in stunning 3D combat with iconic heroes.

features: Tournament, Race, and Time Trial modes
